title: Roundtable synthesis
description: The synthesizer's final consensus answer, written from the full record (organizer analysis + locked consensus + resolved/open points + every seat answer). The orchestrator validates every claim's attribution against the record before adopting it.

consensus_answer.description: The single, self-contained answer to the task — the deliverable.

attribution_map.description: Each major claim in the consensus answer traced to its source in the record.

claim.description: A major claim from the consensus answer.

source.description: Where it comes from: 'consensus', a unique-insight id (e.g. 'U1'), a resolved point id (e.g. 'C2'), or 'orchestrator-call'.

confidence_rationale.description: Why the answer warrants its confidence — what is solid vs. what rests on a contested or orchestrator-decided point.

confidence.description: The synthesizer's confidence (0-100) in the consensus answer.
